src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate the import statement from the Java EE javax.annotation package to the Jakarta EE jakarta.annotation package.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The javax.annotation package was removed in Java 11 and is not available in Java 17; using it causes a compile error 'package javax.annotation does not exist'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation with jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; using it causes a compile error (package not found) on JDK 17 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Fix invalid escape sequence in string literal to comply with stricter Java compiler rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compilation error: invalid escape sequence '\'' in string literal (Java 17 compiler is stricter about unrecognized escape sequences than older versions).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace the legacy Hibernate5 Jackson module with the Jakarta EE namespace variant to support the migration from javax to jakarta packages.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The original Hibernate5Module relies on javax.persistence classes which are removed or incompatible in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3/JDK 17+), causing ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace the deprecated setLabels method with setLabelFilter to adapt to the Liquibase API changes in newer versions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The method setLabels(String) was removed or deprecated in newer Liquibase versions; calling it causes a compile error or runtime NoSuchMethodError.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 5.7+ API changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6.0; extending it causes compilation errors or severe deprecation warnings in modern Spring Boot 3.x environments.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to align with Spring Security 6.0 method security configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity is removed in Spring Security 6.0; using it results in a compilation error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate HTTP security configuration from imperative configure(HttpSecurity) method to declarative SecurityFilterChain bean.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The configure(HttpSecurity) method is removed in Spring Security 6.0; security rules must be defined via a SecurityFilterChain bean.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before:
@Override
public void configure(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after:
@Bean
public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace antMatchers with requestMatchers in authorization rules to comply with Spring Security 6.0 API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: antMatchers is removed in Spring Security 6.0; using it causes a compilation error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace authorizeRequests with authorizeHttpRequests to comply with Spring Security 6.0 API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: authorizeRequests is removed in Spring Security 6.0; using it causes a compilation error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated header configuration methods (featurePolicy, frameOptions.deny) with new lambda-based API and permissionsPolicy.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Old header configuration methods are removed or deprecated in Spring Security 6.0; using them causes compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace custom JWT configuration with standard OAuth2 Resource Server JWT configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Custom JWT filters are often incompatible with Spring Security 6.0's default OAuth2 resource server setup; migration ensures compatibility with standard Spring Security 6.0 flows.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace custom SecurityProblemSupport exception handling with standard BearerTokenAuthenticationEntryPoint and BearerTokenAccessDeniedHandler.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Custom exception handling may conflict with Spring Security 6.0's default OAuth2 resource server exception handling; standard handlers ensure correct HTTP 401/403 responses.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove WebSecurity configuration for ignoring static resources as it is no longer needed or handled differently.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: WebSecurity configuration is often redundant or incompatible with the new SecurityFilterChain approach in Spring Security 6.0.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update CSRF configuration to use lambda-based API and ignore specific request matchers.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Old CSRF configuration methods are deprecated/removed in Spring Security 6.0; using them causes compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace CorsFilter with SpaWebFilter for handling SPA-specific requests.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: CorsFilter may not be compatible with the new security filter chain order in Spring Security 6.0; SpaWebFilter is a more appropriate replacement for SPA applications.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update session management configuration to use lambda-based API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Old session management methods are deprecated/removed in Spring Security 6.0; using them causes compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update content security policy configuration to use lambda-based API and JHipsterProperties.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Old content security policy methods are deprecated/removed in Spring Security 6.0; using them causes compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update referrer policy configuration to use lambda-based API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Old referrer policy methods are deprecated/removed in Spring Security 6.0; using them causes compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+, causing compile errors if not replaced with jakarta.servlet.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update CORS configuration to use getAllowedOriginPatterns instead of getAllowedOrigins to comply with stricter Spring Security 6 / Spring Boot 3 CORS handling.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Spring Security 6 deprecates/removes getAllowedOrigins in favor of getAllowedOriginPatterns to prevent security vulnerabilities with wildcard origins. Using the old method may cause runtime warnings or failures depending on configuration strictness.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update Swagger endpoint paths from v2 to v3 and adjust resource paths to match SpringDoc OpenAPI 2+ conventions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: SpringDoc OpenAPI 2+ (used in Spring Boot 3) uses /v3/api-docs and /swagger-ui/** instead of /v2/api-docs and /swagger-resources. The old paths will return 404s.
